title: Return to Reason: Four Films by Man Ray
original_title: Return to Reason: Four Films by Man Ray
overview: An immersion into the surreal and dreamlike world of painter, photographer and filmmaker Man Ray (1890-1976), one of the most prolific American visual artists, through four of his short films, brought to life by the atmospheric music of SQÜRL.

trailers.title: Jim Jarmusch & Carter Logan on Scoring Man Ray's Short Films

trailer_groups.title: Jim Jarmusch & Carter Logan on Scoring Man Ray's Short Films

en.title: Jim Jarmusch & Carter Logan on Scoring Man Ray's Short Films
